US5119831A.title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR DETECTING PRESSURE OF SELECTED BODY PARTS

step1_independent_claims_analysis.technical_problem: The need for a reliable and accurate method to measure tongue strength and endurance in patients with speech disorders
step1_independent_claims_analysis.technical_solution: A portable, battery-powered device that uses fluid-filled bulbs to sense pressure generated by the tongue and hand
step1_independent_claims_analysis.function_and_purpose: To provide a reliable and accurate method for measuring tongue strength and endurance in patients with speech disorders
step1_independent_claims_analysis.scope_and_limitations: The device is limited to measuring pressure generated by the tongue and hand, and may not be suitable for measuring other types of pressure

step2_necessary_components.function: to sense pressure generated by the tongue and hand
to convert the pressure sensed by the bulb to an electrical signal
to compare the sensed pressure to a selected predetermined pressure level
to detect the peak pressure sensed by the bulb

step3_corresponding_diagrams.diagram_description: a cross-sectional view of the fluid-filled bulb
a block diagram of the transducer and its connections
a schematic diagram of the pressure comparator circuit
a block diagram of the peak pressure detection circuit

step4_key_diagrams.reasoning: The primary diagram shows the fluid-filled bulb, which is the core component of the invention

US5119831A.overall_summary: 本专利提出了一种便携式压力检测设备，用于测量人体某些部位（如口腔和手）所产生的压力。该设备采用液体填充的球体来感知压力，并具有转换器、压力比较电路和峰值压力检测电路等组件。该设备可用于评估和诊断各种语音障碍和病理条件。

US6702765B2.title: APPARATUS FOR MEASURING TONGUE/HARD PALATE CONTACT PRESSURE

step1_independent_claims_analysis.technical_problem: Measuring tongue strength and contact pressure between the tongue and hard palate for diagnosis and treatment of swallowing disorders
step1_independent_claims_analysis.technical_solution: A device with a sensor support surface and electronic pressure sensor to measure tongue pressure in an environment simulating natural swallowing
step1_independent_claims_analysis.function_and_purpose: To provide a device for measuring tongue pressure and contact pressure between the tongue and hard palate for diagnosis and treatment of swallowing disorders
step1_independent_claims_analysis.scope_and_limitations: The device is designed for use in an environment that closely approximates the configuration of the tongue and mouth during natural swallowing

step2_necessary_components.function: To fit closely adjacent to the hard palate and support the electronic pressure sensor
To measure the pressure exerted by the tongue against the hard palate
To reproducibly locate the sensor support surface within the client's mouth

step3_corresponding_diagrams.diagram_description: A perspective view of the apparatus
A cross-sectional view of the sensor support surface and electronic pressure sensor
A perspective view of the mouth registration means engaging the mouth structure

step4_key_diagrams.reasoning: The primary diagram shows the overall apparatus and its components, providing a clear understanding of the device's structure and function

US6702765B2.overall_summary: 该专利提出了一种用于测量舌头与硬腭接触压力的装置，用于吞咽障碍的诊断和治疗。该装置包括一个传感器支撑表面和电子压力传感器，模拟自然吞咽环境。该装置的主要组件包括传感器支撑表面、电子压力传感器和口腔注册机构。

US20240056124A1.title: 900 SIGNALING FOR MULTIPLE TRANSMISSION RECEPTION POINT ACTIVATION AND DEACTIVATION

step1_independent_claims_analysis.technical_problem: Activation and deactivation of multiple transmission reception points (TRPs) in wireless communication systems
step1_independent_claims_analysis.technical_solution: Using Layer 3 control signaling and Layer 2 control signaling to configure and activate/deactivate TRPs
step1_independent_claims_analysis.function_and_purpose: To enable efficient activation and deactivation of multiple TRPs in wireless communication systems
step1_independent_claims_analysis.scope_and_limitations: Limited to wireless communication systems using Layer 3 and Layer 2 control signaling

step4_key_diagrams.reasoning: Figure 1 shows the overall system architecture and is the most relevant to the invention

US9149675B2.title: THERAPY DEVICE FOR TRISMUS PREVENTION AND TREATMENT

step1_independent_claims_analysis.technical_problem: Trismus, a medical complication that restricts range of motion in the oral cavity
step1_independent_claims_analysis.technical_solution: A therapy device that uses springs to provide force, opening the mouth to stretch the muscles of mastication
step1_independent_claims_analysis.function_and_purpose: The device prevents developing trismus, helps cure it, and acts as a piece of exercise equipment
step1_independent_claims_analysis.scope_and_limitations: The device is designed for trismus prevention and treatment, and includes a first arm hingedly connected to a second arm, with a spring device disposed therebetween

step2_necessary_components.function: Provides a structure for the device to open the mouth
Provides a structure for the device to open the mouth
Provides force to open the mouth and stretch the muscles of mastication
Allows the user to bite down on the device and exercise their jaw

step3_corresponding_diagrams.diagram_description: Perspective view of the therapy device shown in a partially open position
Perspective view of the therapy device shown in a partially open position
Side view of the therapy device shown in a fully closed position
Perspective view of the therapy device shown in a fully open position

step4_key_diagrams.reasoning: This figure shows the overall structure of the device and how it is used to open the mouth

US11969387B2.title: KIT, TOOLS, AND METHOD FOR TREATMENT OF FACIAL INJURIES AND DISORDERS

step1_independent_claims_analysis.technical_problem: Treatment of facial injuries and disorders
step1_independent_claims_analysis.technical_solution: Intraoral tool with inserts for low load prolonged stretch to orofacial musculature
step1_independent_claims_analysis.function_and_purpose: To provide a delivery of intraoral treatment for facial injuries or disorders
step1_independent_claims_analysis.scope_and_limitations: Limited to treatment of facial injuries and disorders using intraoral tools

step2_necessary_components.function: Provide low load prolonged stretch to orofacial musculature

step2_necessary_components.component_name: Tool handle or tool mounting bracket

step3_corresponding_diagrams.diagram_description: Inserts for low load prolonged stretch

step3_corresponding_diagrams.component_name: Tool handle or tool mounting bracket
step3_corresponding_diagrams.diagram_description: Tool handle or tool mounting bracket coupling intraoral tool to inserts

step4_key_diagrams.reasoning: Shows the intraoral tool with inserts, which is the core innovation of the patent
